chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3667 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ زُرَارَةَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : بَعَثَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلاً إِلَى زِيَادِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اَللَّهِ فَقَالَ "وَلِّ ذَا بَعْضَ عَمَلِكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3667 - It is narrated from Ubayd ibn Zurarah that he said:
Abu Abdillah (as) sent a man to Ziyad ibn Ubaydillah and said: "Appoint this person to some of your work."
